name: @agent-connect/cli
description: Agent Connect command line — bridges Telegram Forum topics to Claude Code / Codex sessions in tmux
author: Django <six.django@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @agent-connect/telegramify-markdown build && pnpm --filter @agent-connect/bot build && tsx src/index.ts start
scripts.prepack: pnpm --filter @agent-connect/telegramify-markdown build && pnpm --filter @agent-connect/bot build && pnpm build
